goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:00' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:00 and should depart from peterborough
The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get phone number and area
